surface_verification.justification: Internal RTM renderer date-formatting fix (Verification Timeline Date column); no startable user-facing surface. Verified by the compliance suite (897) and a real-data probe: re-rendering the live webui event log with the fix yields 0 date-column inversions (was 1) and the +02:00 event now shows its UTC date 2026-05-12.

behaviors.behavior: utc_date normalizes a non-UTC offset to the UTC date (e.g. 00:27+02:00 -> previous-day 2026-05-12)
utc_date falls back to the literal ts[:10] prefix when the timestamp won't parse
Verification Timeline Date column is monotonic descending across mixed-timezone events; the +02:00 event renders its UTC date, not local
